title: `gh auth login` creates duplicates entries in Keychain Access
body: `gh auth login` creates duplicate macOS Keychain entries for the same service. This results in multiple Keychain entries and confusion for the stored token.

title: `gh repo sync` silently corrupts worktree when synced branch is checked out in a different worktree
body: `gh repo sync` uses git update-ref and can silently corrupt a worktree when the synced branch is checked out elsewhere.

title: `gh repo list OWNER --visibility private` returns `internal` repos
body: The command returns repositories with visibility internal even when private was requested, which breaks visibility management flows.

title: pr status counts cancelled runs as failures despite newer successful run
body: Cancelled workflow runs are counted as failures in `gh pr status` even when a newer run for the same check has succeeded.

title: `gh pr merge`: auto-select the only allowed merge method instead of prompting
body: When exactly one merge method is enabled, the CLI should automatically use that method instead of prompting interactively.

title: `gh agent-task view --log`: add --json support for structured agent logs
body: There is no way to get structured output of the underlying agent execution. This requests JSON support for integrations.

title: Emoji's should be returned as the text if terminal host doesn't support them
body: When the terminal host does not support emoji rendering, text fallbacks should be returned instead.

title: Env var to host trust mapping for token authentication
body: Environment variable authentication has no concept of a trusted host for enterprise tokens, which can cause tokens to be sent to unexpected hosts.
